serverInfo.name: agent-security-mcp
serverInfo.description: Security scanning and audit tools for AI agent workflows — prompt injection detection, secret scanning, scope validation, and permission auditing
serverInfo.author: THRONE AI

tools.name: scan_mcp_config
tools.description: Scan MCP server configuration for security vulnerabilities

tools.name: detect_prompt_injection
tools.description: Analyze text for prompt injection attempts with risk scoring

tools.name: validate_scope_contract
tools.description: Check agent actions against scope contract for compliance

tools.name: scan_secrets
tools.description: Detect leaked API keys, tokens, and credentials in text/code

tools.name: audit_agent_permissions
tools.description: Audit agent permissions and flag over-privileged access

tools.name: detect_tool_poisoning
tools.description: Analyze MCP tool definitions for hidden poisoning instructions (OWASP Agentic Top 10)
